Who it's for

Built for everyone
who deals with paperwork

From freelancers to students — if you have documents to manage, BillosDock makes it effortless.

💼
Freelancers

Store client invoices, contracts, and payment proofs in one place. Never lose a bill before tax season again.

InvoicesContractsTax docs
🏪
Business Owners

Manage purchase bills, vendor invoices, and tax documents without hunting through email threads or filing cabinets.

Purchase billsTax docsVendor docs
👤
Individuals

Hospital bills, electronics receipts, insurance papers, ID documents — keep all your personal paperwork secure with warranty reminders so you never miss a claim.

Hospital billsWarranty alertsInsurance
🎓
Students

Marksheets, fee receipts, certificates, scholarship documents — organise by semester and share instantly for admissions or internship applications.

MarksheetsCertificatesFee receipts
Features

Everything you need,
nothing you don't

Designed for the way people actually use documents — on mobile, often offline, and always needing to share fast.

📂
Nested Folders

Create folders by year, client, semester, or category. Organised exactly the way your brain works.

💧
Smart Watermarking

Auto-stamp "For Verification Only" or your name before sharing. Your IDs and invoices can't be misused by anyone.

📶
Offline Access

No signal? No problem. Frequently used documents are cached locally so you're never stuck when it matters most.

🔍
Instant Search

Find any document by name or date in under a second. No more scrolling through hundreds of files.

🔒
Encrypted Backup

Every file is encrypted before it leaves your device. Your documents are safe even if your phone is lost or stolen.

🔗
Secure Share Links

Share a folder with your accountant, college, or client via a secure link. Set expiry dates so access doesn't last forever.

⏰
Warranty Reminders

Tag electronics and appliance bills with their warranty period. Get notified before coverage expires — never miss a free repair window again.

🏥
Medical Bill Organiser

Keep hospital bills, prescriptions, and insurance claim documents in a dedicated folder. Ready when your insurer asks.

📤
Bulk Upload

Upload multiple files at once from your gallery or files app. Catch up on a month's receipts in one go.

Use Cases

See how people use BillosDock

Real situations where BillosDock saves the day.

Stop chasing invoices across email and chat apps

You send 10 invoices a month across multiple clients. By the time tax season comes, half are buried in threads. BillosDock keeps every invoice timestamped, searchable, and shareable.

  • ✓ Folder per client — past work always findable
  • ✓ Watermark invoices before sending to protect yourself
  • ✓ Share a billing folder link with your accountant in seconds
  • ✓ Never miss a tax deadline because of missing documents

Tax filing doesn't have to be a nightmare

Purchase bills, vendor invoices, utility receipts — it piles up fast. BillosDock keeps it month by month so your accountant gets everything without follow-up.

  • ✓ Folder per month — ready for your accountant instantly
  • ✓ Store vendor bills and purchase invoices together
  • ✓ Bulk upload at end of each week to stay current
  • ✓ Share your billing folder in one link — done

All your personal documents, one secure place

Hospital bills, electronics receipts, insurance papers, ID documents — keep them safe, watermarked, and shareable. Get reminders before warranties expire so you never miss a claim window.

  • ✓ Store ID documents with a "For Verification Only" watermark
  • ✓ Keep hospital bills ready for insurance claims
  • ✓ Save electronics bills and get reminded before warranty expires
  • ✓ Share documents securely with full control over access

Admissions, internships, scholarships — sorted

Every semester brings new certificates, fee receipts, and results. Keep everything semester-wise and share with colleges or employers in seconds.

  • ✓ Organise by semester — Sem 1, Sem 2, and so on
  • ✓ Upload marksheets, certificates, and fee receipts instantly
  • ✓ Share a folder link with college or internship HR in one tap
  • ✓ Free plan is enough for most students — ₹0 forever

How it works

Up and running in 2 minutes

No complicated setup. No learning curve. Just sign in and start uploading.

1
Sign in with Google

One tap login with your Google account. Available now on Android — iOS coming soon.

2
Create folders

Set up folders for invoices, hospital bills, warranties, certificates — whatever makes sense for you.

3
Upload, share & relax

Snap a receipt, upload a PDF, or bulk-import. Share anytime, from anywhere, with full control.

FAQ

Common questions

Yes. The free plan gives you 50 MB of storage with no time limit and no credit card needed. It's genuinely free — not a 14-day trial. Students and individuals with basic needs may never need to upgrade.
Your documents are encrypted before being uploaded and stored securely. We never sell or share your data. Share links can be set to expire so access is always in your control.
BillosDock supports PDFs, JPG, PNG, and common document formats. Whether it's a scanned hospital bill, a photographed receipt, or a downloaded invoice — it all works.
Yes. Documents you've recently opened are cached on your device. So even in a low-signal area — at a hospital, bank, or while travelling — your key documents are accessible.
When you upload an electronics or appliance bill, you can set a warranty expiry date. BillosDock will notify you 30 days before it expires so you can raise a claim or extend the warranty in time.
BillosDock is currently available on Android. iOS is coming soon — join the waitlist via the contact form below and we'll notify you the moment it launches.
Absolutely. No lock-in. Cancel your subscription anytime from the app — your documents remain accessible and you drop to the free plan automatically.
